full_text:
Yin Guan (Kongxiu) 殷觀 (孔休)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yin Guan (殷觀), styledKongxiu (孔休), was born in Jing province (Yicheng county, Xiangyang commandery?). Warned Liu Bei not to join Sun Quan in an invasion of Liu Zhang. Yin Guan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.
